frontmatter.title: Backdrop
frontmatter.description: The Backdrop component overlays a dimmed background across the screen to direct focus to specific content in the foreground, like loading indicators, modals, or dialogs. It visually signals that the background content is temporarily inaccessible. The Backdrop can be closed when clicked, depending on the close action set in its props.
